title: LostCraft
description: A Vanilla+ Modpack with a focus on optimisation and QoL improvements with no additional gameplay.
body:
LostCraft is a Vanilla+ Modpack that focuses on enhancing a vanilla Minecraft server, without a bunch of additional content to keep track of.

Carefully curated and tested mods contribute to LostCraft's core principles:

### Optimization
Mods are selected to enhance server performance without causing significant drops and ensuring an enjoyable experience for players, especially those using less powerful gaming machines.

### Utility
Client-specific mods are chosen to provide functional or aesthetic benefits to players, all while maintaining the essence of a vanilla playthrough.

### Compatibility
LostCraft prioritizes seamless integration, ensuring that players who choose not to or cannot use a modded client still have an intact and enjoyable gaming experience.


## Core Mods
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat): Proximity and group voice chat chat.
- [Replay Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod): Record your gameplay and create timelapses from different view points.
- [Client Sort](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort): Keep you inventory in check.
- [Death Log](https://modrinth.com/mod/deathlog): Keep track of your heroic (and embarrassing) deaths, where it happened, and what items you dropped.
- [Litematica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica): Building schematics, especially useful for massive redstone projects.
- [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet): Essential server utilities.
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons): See further into the horizon then ever before!
